name: Royal Pot Biryani

description: Crunchy puri with spiced potato and tangy mint water.

description: Crispy papdi topped with yogurt, chutneys, and pomegranate.

description: Soft roll with tossed vegetables and smoky house sauce.

description: Thin crust pizza with bell peppers, onion, and corn.

description: Soft bun, crunchy patty, lettuce, and melty cheese.
